title: BiteForceMC Cobblemon
description: A modpack to join BiteForceMC's Cobblemon server!
body:
[Need Support? Join our Discord!](https://discord.biteforcemc.com/)

⚔️Welcome to BiteForceMC's Cobblemon! ⚔️

Ready to dive into the ultimate Cobblemon experience? The BiteForceMC custom modpack pushes Cobblemon far beyond vanilla with exclusive features, enhanced mechanics, and a carefully curated lineup of must-have mods that make your Pokémon journey feel alive. We’re always rolling out updates, optimizations, and fixes to keep the experience smooth, balanced, and addictive.

🌍 Explore. Battle. Progress.
Journey through a massive Cobblemon world covering Generations 1-9. Discover endless biomes, face off against trainers from around the world, and challenge fully NPC-run gyms designed to test your skills. Earn your badges, prove your strength, and carve your own legacy.

⚔️ Built for Competitive & Peaceful Players Alike
At BiteForceMC, everyone belongs. Whether you’re a hardcore competitive battler chasing perfect teams or a peaceful PvE player who just wants to explore, build, and enjoy the world at your own pace, we’ve got you covered.

🚀 Not Just a Modpack. A Force.
BiteForceMC offers access to Quality builds specifically for smooth, immersive multiplayer gameplay. Team up with friends or go solo in a world crafted for stability, performance, and nonstop fun.



🔗Our Links:
🌐Website: https://biteforcemc.com
🌀Discord: https://discord.biteforcemc.com
